description: Log in to LibreHealth EHR (admin/password) and configure a new X12 Billing Partner for 'Availity Clearinghouse'. Use the following technical specifications: Name: Availity Clearinghouse, ID Number: AVAIL001, Processing Format: 5010, Sender ID (ISA06): 193847502, Receiver ID (ISA08): AVAILITY, and Version: 005010X222A1. Ensure the record is saved and visible in the partner list.
